name: tally
description: A simple calculator for your daily tasks.

extendInfo.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Tally uses your location when you request local weather.

scripts.build:win:x64: set "CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false" && electron-builder --win --x64 --config.directories.output=build/win-x64 --config.win.artifactName="Tally Setup ${version}-x64.${ext}" && node scripts/organize-build.cjs build/win-x64
scripts.build:win:x86: set "CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false" && electron-builder --win --ia32 --config.directories.output=build/win-x86 --config.win.artifactName="Tally Setup ${version}-x86.${ext}" && node scripts/organize-build.cjs build/win-x86
scripts.build:msix:x64: set "CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false" && set "MSIX_ARCH=x64" && electron-builder --win dir --x64 --config.directories.output=build/msix-unpacked-x64 && node scripts/package-msix.cjs
scripts.build:msix:x86: set "CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false" && set "MSIX_ARCH=x86" && electron-builder --win dir --ia32 --config.directories.output=build/msix-unpacked-x86 && node scripts/package-msix.cjs
scripts.build:win: npm run build:win:x64 && npm run build:win:x86 && npm run build:msix:x64 && npm run build:msix:x86
scripts.test: node test/parser.test.mjs && node test/stocks.test.mjs && node test/weather.test.mjs && node test/answer-format.test.mjs
